name: io.github.copyleftdev/laconic
description: Lossless markdown compression for LLM token optimization. Saves 15-55% on structure-heavy docs.

tools.name: compress_markdown
tools.description: Compress markdown text by removing decorative structure (badges, HTML wrappers, table formatting). Returns compressed text with token statistics. Lossless on semantic content.

tools.name: estimate_savings
tools.description: Estimate token savings from compression without producing output. Returns original/compressed token counts, savings percentage, and a recommendation.
